title: JobTracker and TaskTracker Configuration
description: The 'server' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture houses configuration interfaces for JobTracker and TaskTracker components. 'JTConfig.java' in 'server/jobtracker' defines JobTracker configuration parameters, extending 'MRConfig'. It serves as a configuration holder, providing constants for IPC address, job status persistence, and memory limits, adhering to the Strategy pattern. 'TTConfig.java' in 'server/tasktracker' offers TaskTracker-specific configuration constants, like TT_MAP_SLOTS and TT_RESOURCE_CALCULATOR_PLUGIN, also extending 'MRConfig'. Both files function as configuration placeholders, with no direct inputs or outputs, and depend on 'MRConfig', illustrating a consistent configuration management approach across Hadoop MapReduce components.
